package rulecoverage

func NegativeContextNotFirstParameter() string {
    ruleID := "context_not_first_parameter"
    family := "context"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Functions that accept context.Context but not as the first non-receiver parameter on context-aware call paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
